nodes.title: Claude Code hooks must use --permission-mode bypassPermissions for sub-agents
nodes.summary: Hook fires, claude --agent process launches, then hangs indefinitely. The Stop hook times out (default 15s), Claude Code session appears to freeze on exit. Background distiller log shows no output or is empty.

nodes.title: Claude Code background agents must pass --no-session-persistence to avoid recursive Stop hooks
nodes.summary: Stop hook fires, launches a background claude --agent process, which completes — then the Stop hook fires again. This repeats indefinitely, spawning new distiller processes on every cycle. Log file grows unbounded.
